title: Web App: Core Site Navigation

use_cases.name: View Homepage
use_cases.notes: Entry page; triggers client-side init() in app.js on load

use_cases.name: Browse Commands (Terminal View)
use_cases.notes: Fetches command list; rendered via renderTerminalLayout(allCommands) using glass-terminal component

use_cases.name: Browse Patterns & Anti-Patterns
use_cases.notes: Renders tabbed UI via renderPatternsWithTabs(patterns, antipatterns); visitor can switch tabs

use_cases.name: Navigate Gallery Card Stack
use_cases.trigger: Click prev/next buttons or scroll wheel on .gallery-stack-container
use_cases.notes: initGalleryStack() wires prev/next click + wheel event; cycles through .gallery-stack-card elements

use_cases.name: Copy Command Text
use_cases.trigger: Click [data-copy] element → navigator.clipboard.writeText OR execCommand fallback
use_cases.notes: Visual feedback via .copied CSS class for 1500ms

use_cases.name: Navigate Page Sections (Anchor / Hash)
use_cases.trigger: Click anchor links; hash change events
use_cases.notes: initAnchorScroll() + initHashTracking() from public/js/utils/scroll.js; initSectionNav() for section highlights

relationships: Web Visitor --uses--> UC4: View Privacy Policy
UC1 --includes--> UC5: Browse Commands (auto-loaded on homepage)
UC1 --includes--> UC6: Browse Patterns (auto-loaded on homepage)
UC1 --includes--> UC7: Navigate Gallery Card Stack
UC5 --extends--> UC8: Download Asset Bundle (from command card)
UC5 --extends--> UC9: Copy Command Text (from command card)
important_notes: Bun's native `serve()` with route map; static HTML pages imported directly as modules. app.js is the homepage client entry point. Security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options) applied to all responses. Path traversal protection on all wildcard routes.
